zh-tw.title: 土味情話大全
zh-tw.description: 讓人又甜又尷尬的土味情話合集，撩人必備語錄

en.title: Cheesy Pickup Lines
en.description: A collection of cheesy yet charming pickup lines guaranteed to make them smile (or cringe)

zh-tw.content:
「你知道你跟星星有什麼不一樣嗎？」
「什麼？」
「星星在天上，你在我心裡。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 土味情話入門款，成功率中等
variations: 你知道你跟月亮有什麼不一樣嗎？月亮會變，我對你的心不會變

en.content:
"Do you know what's different about you and the stars?"
"What?"
"The stars are in the sky, but you're in my heart."
variations: What's different about you and the moon? The moon changes, but my feelings for you don't.

zh-tw.content:
「我覺得你好像一道數學題。」
「為什麼？」
「因為我對你完全沒有解。」
variations: 你就像微積分，讓我越算越上頭

en.content:
"I think you're like a math problem."
"Why?"
"Because I have absolutely no solution for you."
variations: You're like calculus - the more I work on you, the more obsessed I get.

zh-tw.content:
「你喜歡喝水嗎？」
「喜歡啊。」
「那你已經喜歡上七十幾percent的我了。」
variations: 你喜歡空氣嗎？喜歡啊。那你每一秒都在需要我了。

en.content:
"Do you like drinking water?"
"Sure."
"Then you already like about 70% of me."
variations: Do you like breathing? Good — because I take your breath away, which means you need me to function.

zh-tw.content:
「你今天特別好看。」
「今天？那昨天呢？」
「昨天也是，明天也會是，每天都是。」
variations: 「你今天氣色很好。」「我昨天睡得不好耶。」「那你明天睡飽一定更好看，我現在就期待了。」

en.content:
"You look especially great today."
"Today? What about yesterday?"
"Yesterday too. And tomorrow. And every day."
variations: "You look great today." "I actually didn't sleep well last night." "Then tomorrow is going to be dangerous. I'm already worried for myself."

zh-tw.content:
你知道我最大的缺點是什麼嗎？

就是缺點你。
variations: 我有個缺點想改，就是缺少你的聯絡方式

en.content:
Do you know what my biggest shortcoming is?

Falling short of being with you.
variations: I have a flaw I'd like to fix: not having your number.

zh-tw.content:
「你是甜甜圈嗎？」
「為什麼？」
「因為我的生活遇到你，才算圓滿了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 甜食愛好者最適合用這招，對方很難不笑
variations: 你是珍珠奶茶嗎？因為沒有你，生活就少了那個讓人開心的驚喜

en.content:
"Are you a donut?"
"Why?"
"Because my life finally feels complete now that you're in it."
en.editorNote: Works best with someone who has a sweet tooth — hard to keep a straight face
variations: Are you boba tea? Because without you, my day is missing that little surprise that makes it worth it.

zh-tw.content:
「你是螢幕保護程式嗎？」
「為什麼這樣問？」
「因為自從遇到你，我就捨不得鎖畫面了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給愛滑手機的對象，效果加分
variations: 你是我手機的省電模式嗎？因為有你在，我什麼都不想做，只想看著你

en.content:
"Are you my screen saver?"
"What do you mean?"
"Because ever since I met you, I can't bring myself to lock the screen."
en.editorNote: Send this to someone who's always on their phone — extra points for irony
variations: Are you my low battery mode? Because with you around, I don't want to do anything else — just stay right here.

zh-tw.content:
「你知道你跟拼圖有什麼共同點嗎？」
「什麼？」
「沒有你，我這輩子都拼不完整。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 喜歡玩拼圖的對象超適用，也可以直接配上一張拼圖照片一起傳
variations: 你是我最後一塊拼圖——找了好久，原來你一直在這裡

en.content:
"Do you know what you have in common with a puzzle?"
"What?"
"Without you, I'll never be complete."
en.editorNote: Bonus points if you send this with a photo of a puzzle missing one piece
variations: You're my last puzzle piece — I searched everywhere, and you were here all along.

zh-tw.content:
「你信不信，只要你說一句話，我就知道你現在在想什麼？」
「好，你說說看。」
「你現在在想：『這個人怎麼這麼煩』，但你其實有一點點喜歡這種感覺。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 互動式情話，適合曖昧期試水溫，對方笑了就代表有戲
variations: 也可以用：「你現在在想——『這個人真的很無聊，但不知道為什麼我還是在這裡』」

en.content:
"Bet I know exactly what you're thinking right now."
"Oh yeah? Let's hear it."
"You're thinking: 'This person is so annoying.' But somewhere in there, you kind of enjoy it."
en.editorNote: Great for the flirty testing phase — if they laugh, that's a green light
variations: Alternate version: 'You're thinking: this person is ridiculous. And yet here you are, still reading this.'

zh-tw.content:
「你知道流星跟你有什麼共同點嗎？」
「什麼？」
「看到你的瞬間，讓人忍不住想許願。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 晚上看星星的時候說，效果翻倍，對方基本上沒有辦法不笑
variations: 你比流星還稀有——流星至少每年有固定的日子，但像你這樣的人，這輩子只遇得到一次

en.content:
"Do you know what you have in common with a shooting star?"
"What?"
"The moment I see you, I can't help but make a wish."
en.editorNote: Say this while stargazing for double effect — nearly impossible not to smile at
variations: You're rarer than a shooting star — they come around every year, but someone like you only happens once in a lifetime.

zh-tw.content:
「你喜歡吃棉花糖嗎？」
「還好啊。」
「那就是你的感覺——甜但不膩，讓人嚐一口就還想再一口。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 在甜點店或市集裡說，自然又不尷尬，對方多半會假裝翻白眼但心裡很開心
variations: 你比棉花糖還甜，但比它更難忘——棉花糖吃完就沒了，你讓我一直在想

en.content:
"Do you like cotton candy?"
"It's okay, I guess."
"That's exactly what you're like — sweet without being overwhelming. One taste and I always want more."
en.editorNote: Works best at a market or dessert shop — casual enough not to feel rehearsed
variations: You're sweeter than cotton candy, but way harder to forget — candy disappears, but you stay on my mind.

zh-tw.content:
「你是我的飛航模式嗎？」
「什麼意思？」
「因為只要跟你在一起，我就想把整個世界的訊號都關掉，只留下你。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給習慣低頭滑手機的對象，暗示你想要對方的全部注意力
variations: 你是我的勿擾模式——不是因為你讓我煩，是因為有你在，其他的通知都不重要了

en.content:
"Are you airplane mode?"
"What do you mean?"
"Because whenever I'm with you, I want to turn off every signal in the world and keep only you."
en.editorNote: Send to someone who's always on their phone — a gentle way of asking for their full attention
variations: You're my do-not-disturb mode — not because you're annoying, but because when you're here, nothing else needs my attention.

zh-tw.content:
「如果你今天找不到路，往我這個方向走就好。」
「你知道路嗎？」
「不知道。但我知道我在這裡等你，不管你從哪個方向來。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給迷路（字面意義或心情上）的另一半，安心感十足
variations: 我不確定前面的路怎麼走，但我確定我想跟你一起走過去

en.content:
"If you ever feel lost today, just walk toward me."
"Do you know the way?"
"No. But I know I'll be here waiting, no matter which direction you come from."
en.editorNote: Send this when your partner is literally lost, or just having an overwhelming day — works for both
variations: I don't know what's ahead of us. But I know I want to walk there with you.
